basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 07-08-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or an equivalent discipline, along with a valid GATE qualification, First Class M.E./M.Tech. degree in High Voltage or Power System Engineering along with a valid GATE qualification
qualification.details: First Class B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or an equivalent discipline, along with a valid GATE qualification. Desirable: First Class M.E./M.Tech. degree in High Voltage or Power System Engineering along with a valid GATE qualification.

salary_details.details: ₹37,000/- per month for the first two years (JRF) ₹42,000/- per month for the third year (SRF)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee is 07-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a First Class B.E./B.Tech. degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or equivalent with a valid GATE qualification. A desirable qualification is a First Class M.E./M.Tech. degree in High Voltage or Power System Engineering with a valid GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years (JRF) and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year (SRF).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email. Ensure you follow the application procedure outlined in the official notification and send your application before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: IIT Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
